nasb.text: Then Jesse called Abinadab and made him pass before Samuel. And he said, “The Lord has not chosen this one either.”

esv.text: Then Jesse called Abinadab and made him pass before Samuel. And he said, “Neither has the Lord chosen this one.”

cnv.text: 耶西叫亞比拿達在撒母耳面前經過，撒母耳說：“這也不是耶和華所揀選的。”

ccb.text: 耶西吩咐他的儿子亚比拿达从撒母耳面前走过，但撒母耳说：“这也不是耶和华拣选的人。”
